title: Grupo Erik Insulated Lunch Bag - Minion Gifts | 8 x 9 x 5 inches - 20 x 23 x 13 cm Adults & Kids School Lunch Bag | Minions Gifts for Adults, Gifts Under 15 Pounds
features: Playful Minions Merchandise - Add a touch of fun to your meals with these lunch bags for women and men featuring the hilarious Minions. Perfect for fans of the mischievous yellow characters who love combining practicality with humour.

Durable & Insulated Construction - Made from 100% polyester with an aluminum-lined interior, this lunch box kids keeps your food fresh and at the perfect temperature, making it ideal for both hot and cold meals.

Convenient & Functional - Compartment lunch box Includes a side mesh pocket so you can put the water bottle, sturdy handles, and a secure zipper closure, offering ample space and easy organization for all your lunch essentials.

Compact & Practical Size - Measuring approximately 20 x 23 x 13 cm / 8 x 9 x 5 inches / 6 L, this lunchbox is the perfect size for carrying to school, work, or picnics, combining practicality with a touch of whimsical charm.

Creating Your Story - Grupo Erik creates 100% official licensed stationery and merchandise inspired by the world’s most loved brands. Combining functionality and durability, our products are designed to be part of your daily life.
description: A lunch bag is one of the best things you can get for yourself! There is nothing as healthy as having fresh, home-cooked meals and if you have a busy work life, then a lunch bag is the solution. You can plan and cook all your meals at home and then pack them in your lunch bag for the office. The meals will stay hot (or cold if you want) and you can have them in the office. This ensures that you will not have to depend on convenience store foods or unhealthy snacks. Where you carry your lunch is sometimes as important as what you’re having for lunch. You want your bag, tote, or box to look stylish, inspire joy, and make you happy to bring your well thought out meals with you. Erik's packed lunch bags are lightweight and fit nicely into your school backpacks and school bags! We're obsessed with the Minions design on this thermal lunch bag. Made from insulated material (even though it doesn't look like it!), your food will stay at the right temperature until it's time to eat. And it looks very cool too!
